data.content: Implemented display-only version normalization on branch feat/foolery-4c96-version-normalize. Added `src/lib/version-display.ts`, updated the version badge/banner to render a single visible `v` prefix for both prefixed and unprefixed release tags, and added regression coverage for the update popover and banner rendering. Validation passed: `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build`.
